title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
summary: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui 是一个基于 Gradio 的 Stable Diffusion 网页界面，支持文本生成图像、图像到图像转换、放大等功能，集成了深度学习模型，广泛应用于 AI 艺术创作。
summary_en: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui is a Gradio-based web interface for Stable Diffusion, supporting text-to-image, image-to-image, upscaling, and other features, integrating deep learning models widely used in AI art creation.
